mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM REFUND_APPLICATION WHERE TRANSACTION_ID = #{transactionId} AND STATUS NOT IN ('REJECTED', 'FAILED')
SELECT NVL(SUM(REFUND_AMOUNT), 0) FROM REFUND_APPLICATION WHERE TRANSACTION_ID = #{transactionId} AND STATUS NOT IN ('REJECTED', 'FAILED')
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM REFUND_APPLICATION WHERE TRANSACTION_ID = #{transactionId} AND STATUS IN ('PENDING_REVIEW', 'APPROVED', 'EXECUTING')
